# Security Policy

## Reporting a Vulnerability

**Please do not report security vulnerabilities through public GitHub issues.**

Email us at **security@deploysquad.ai** with:

- A description of the vulnerability
- Steps to reproduce
- Potential impact
- Any suggested fix (optional)

We will acknowledge your report within **72 hours** and aim to provide a fix or mitigation plan within 14 days for critical issues.

We appreciate responsible disclosure and will credit reporters (with permission) in release notes.
